description: Quality tier definitions for puzzle data completeness rating

changelog.author: initial
changelog.changes: Initial 5-tier quality system (premium to unverified) with display colors.

1.name: premium
1.description: Full solution tree with multiple lines, rich refutations, and explanatory comments

2.name: high
2.description: Complete solution with good refutation coverage and comments

3.name: standard
3.description: Valid solution with at least one refutation branch

4.name: basic
4.description: Solution tree present but no refutation branches

5.name: unverified
5.description: Problem setup only - solution not yet verified in our system
